mode.title: Operation mode
mode.description: search = find apps by niche; lookup = details for given app IDs; reviews = pull country reviews.

searchTerm.title: Search keyword
searchTerm.description: Niche to research (e.g. 'habit tracker', 'meditation'). Used in search mode.

country.title: Source App Store country
country.description: ISO country of the source store (us, gb, ...). Leave 'us' to find US winners.

maxResults.title: Max apps
maxResults.description: Max apps to return in search mode (max 200).

appIds.title: App IDs
appIds.description: iTunes app IDs for lookup/reviews mode (e.g. '337472899').

checkLanguage.title: Language gap to flag
checkLanguage.description: ISO language to check (de, fr, es, it). Apps NOT supporting it are flagged missingLanguage=true.

includeReviews.title: Auto-extract reviews in search
includeReviews.description: Also pull reviews for each app found (slower).

reviewCountry.title: Reviews country override
reviewCountry.description: Country to fetch reviews from (e.g. search US apps, read DE reviews). Defaults to checkLanguage's market.

reviewPages.title: Review pages
reviewPages.description: Pages of reviews per app (1 page ~50 reviews, max 10).

filterKeywords.title: Filter reviews by keywords
filterKeywords.description: Only keep reviews containing these words (e.g. 'translate','german','language').
